query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name, u.email, u.leaderId, u.departamentoId, d.id as deptId, d.nome as deptNome 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Bruno%Vieira%' OR u.email LIKE '%bruno.vieira%';
command:
